GOVERNMENT NOTICE
COOPERATIVE GOVERNANCE
No. R.
2020
DISASTER MANAGEMENT ACT, 2002: AMENDMENT OF REGULATIONS ISSUED IN
TERMS OF SECTION 27(2)
I, Dr Nkosazana Diamini Zuma, Minister of Cooperative Governance and Traditional Affairs,
designated under section 3 of the Disaster Management Act, 2002 (Act No. 57 of 2002),
having declared a national state of disaster, published in Government Gazette No. 43096,
Government Notice No. 313 of 15 March 2020, and extended by Government Notices Nos.
646 of 5 June 2020, 765 of 13 July 2020, 889 of 15 August 2020,995 of 14 September 2020
and 998 of 18 September 2020, hereby in terms of section 27(2) of the Disaster Management
Act, 2002, after consultation with the relevant Cabinet members, make the Regulations in the
Schedule.
DR NKOSAZANA DLAMINI ZUMA, MP
MINISTER OF COOPERATIVE GOVERNANCE AND TRADITIONAL AFFAIRS
DATE: Of
f C x(020
SCHEDULE
Definitions
1.
In these Regulations, "the Regulations" means the regulations published by
Government Notice No. R. 480 of 29 April 2020 as amended by Government Notices Nos. R.
608 of 28 May 2020, R. 714 of 25 June 2020, R.763 of 12 July 2020, R. 846 of 31 July 2020
R. 891 of 17 August 2020, No. 999 of 18 September 2020 and No. 1011 of 20 September
2020.
Amendment of regulation 69 of the Regulations
(a)
2.
Subregulation (14) of regulation 69 of the Regulations is hereby amended by-
the substitution for the phrase "Sporting activities, including both professional and non-
professional matches, by recognised sporting bodies are allowed, subject to the
following:" of the following phrase:
"Sport, arts and culture activities, including both professional and non -professional
matches, by recognised sporting bodies, are allowed, subject to the following:"; and
(b)
the substitution for paragraph (e) of the following paragraph:
"(e)
international sport, arts and culture events involving countries with a low or
medium COVID -19 infection and transmission rate are allowed. ".
This gazette is also available free online at www.gpwonline.co.za
	
STAATSKOERANT, 1 OKTOBER 2020 
No. 43763    3
Government Notices • Goewermentskennisgewings
Co-operative Governance, Department of/ Samewerkende Regering, Departement van
DEPARTMENT OF CO-OPERATIVE GOVERNANCE
NO. 1053   
01 OCTOBER 2020
1053	
Disaster Management Act (57/2002): Amendment of regulations issued in terms of section 27(2)	
	
43763

Amendment of Table 4 of the Regulations
3.
Table 4 - Specific Exclusions - of the Regulations is hereby amended by the
substitution for item 7 of the following item:
"International sport, arts and culture events involving countries with a high COVID-
19 infection and transmission rate are prohibited. ".
This gazette is also available free online at www.gpwonline.co.za
